Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE

RULING: No other appearance. Defendants Kimberly Xurnizki, William Xurnizki's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,055, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR.
